message:
feat(ftui-web): add golden-trace JSONL serialization + checksum gates (bd-lff4p.5.2)

Add JSONL serialization/deserialization for SessionTrace following the
golden-trace-v1 spec, plus a gate_trace() API for CI-friendly replay
validation with actionable diffs on mismatch.

Key additions:
- SessionTrace::to_jsonl() / from_jsonl() round-trip serialization
- Event serialization covering all Event variants (Key, Mouse, Paste,
  Focus, Clipboard, Tick, Resize) with modifier/button/keycode encoding
- gate_trace<M>() validates replay checksums and returns GateReport with
  frame-level diff context on failure
- 46 new tests (70 total for module): JSONL round-trip, event encoding,
  gate pass/fail, escape/unescape, parser edge cases
- All clippy-clean, wasm32-unknown-unknown verified

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
